# ForgentFramework

> Technology-agnostic Multi-Agent Development Specification (Orchestrator/Executor/Critic) and the minimal agent setup used to maintain it.

Key constraints: treat `MULTI_AGENT_SPEC.md` as the canonical source of truth; keep changes small and reviewable; keep committed artifacts in English.

## Key Files
- [MULTI_AGENT_SPEC.md](MULTI_AGENT_SPEC.md): the canonical specification
- [README.md](README.md): repository overview
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): agent working agreements for this repository
- [.github/copilot-instructions.md](.github/copilot-instructions.md): always-on Copilot workspace instructions

## Tools
- [tools/validate_spec.py](tools/validate_spec.py): lightweight validation for spec Markdown (fences/headings)
